name: drawer
description: Slide-in drawer built on Base UI Drawer (stable v1.3.0+). No third-party drawer library needed.

docs.usage:
// DrawerTrigger accepts a render prop — pass any element you want as the trigger
<Drawer>
  <DrawerTrigger render={<button className="...">Open Drawer</button>} />
  <DrawerContent side="right">
    <DrawerHeader>
      <DrawerTitle>Settings</DrawerTitle>
      <DrawerDescription>Manage your preferences.</DrawerDescription>
    </DrawerHeader>
    <DrawerFooter>
      <DrawerClose render={<button className="...">Close</button>} />
    </DrawerFooter>
  </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>
docs.notes: Base UI uses the render prop pattern instead of asChild. Pass any element to render={}. The trigger renders as that element with all the correct ARIA and event handlers applied.
